inputs.titre: Création du Comité de salut public

reason: The image depicts a scene inside what appears to be a large chamber. Several figures are dressed in clothing that approximates late 18th-century style, including frock coats and high-waisted dresses. There are desks with papers, inkwells, and quill pens, suggesting a setting where documents are being processed. The architecture includes heavy drapes, stone walls, and potentially tapestries in the background, contributing to the atmosphere of gravitas appropriate for the creation of the Committee of Public Safety. The only minor issue is the clothing style, they are a bit modern, they look like late 19 century dress. The candle lamps are consistent with the time period. No explicit anachronisms or fantasy elements are visible.
